sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_proportions (id UInt32, successes_x UInt64, successes_y UInt64, trials_x UInt64, trials_y UInt64, conf_level Float64, pool_type String);
SELECT proportionsZTest(successes_x, successes_y, trials_x, trials_y, conf_level, pool_type) FROM test_proportions WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE test_proportions SET successes_y = 12 WHERE id = 1;
